summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: 10-jewel necklace drawn as a horizontal GREY Line with 10 RED/BLUE alternating Circles strung along it. Two YELLOW DashedLine cuts fall after positions 3 and 7, separating the chain into three pieces that are assigned in an A-B-A pattern by GREEN / PURPLE underlines and owner Tex labels. Bottom MathTex verifies that each thief ends with equal red count and equal blue count — a concrete Borsuk-Ulam consequence for 2 thieves, 2 colors, 2 cuts.
